headline: Desktop homepage symmetry fix and class-name recovery for the editorial home surface.
focus: Repair broken homepage class names and rebalance desktop home layout.
notes: Recovered broken homepage class names so existing CSS applies again.
Rebalanced desktop hero, cover desk, story ribbon, and launch cards.
Converted stacked hierarchy cards into a clear 3-column desktop grid.
Cleaned a few visible mixed-language home copy strings.
